    Julia Shareika
    Jan 10, 2026

    • Report illegal content
    • Copy link

    This extension saved me so much time checking for broken links on my website! The quick scan feature is super efficient and helped me fix issues that were probably hurting my SEO without me even knowing. Highly recommend for any website owner or blogger who wants to maintain a professional site

    Alfon Labadan
    Dec 1, 2025

    • Report illegal content
    • Copy link

    Super useful tool. I ran it on my site and found way more broken links than I expected. The color highlights make it really easy to spot what’s wrong. Clean, fast, and does exactly what I need
